ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assets" (
  "user_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-asset relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "followed_since" TEXT /* Date the user started following the asset */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for alerts (e.g., 10% change) */,
  "watchlist" INTEGER /* Whether the asset is on the user's watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the alert is about */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price change, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily summary, technical analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the notification is about */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
